dialogue.line: *sighhh*
You sure put up a good fight eh?
I'd ALMOST respect you if you weren't my main target of interest.
Dude come on, we can work this out man.
I don't get this whole switchup! You seemed to be a good dude when we met.
Why won't you just let this happen!
You're too stubborn!
Too DAMN stubborn!
*sigh* Look...
I ain't tryna hurt you like that.
I promise I'll explain everything if you just listen and follow.
This is serious and I don't wanna make the big man angry.
HOW can you even expect me to even TRUST you!?
I don't know ANY of you!
I have ZERO idea what your intentions even ARE!
Stay back and just leave my girlfriend and I ALONE!
We don't need you or anyone else.
You actually tried to SHOOT me even!
*sigh* Forget about that...
LISTEN to me... I'll tell you this, ONE, more, time.
This is not an ask.
This is a command.
And it's for your own good...
just
